title: Popups and Ads
drDigitalIntro: Popups are windows that suddenly appear on websites — some are legitimate, some are scams. Safari blocks most popups automatically. Ads are how many websites make money — you'll see banner ads on news sites. Some ads are scams pretending to be download buttons or security warnings. Don't click on ads that look suspicious. If something says 'Click here to download!' but you're not on a download page, it's probably a fake ad. Close popups by clicking the X.
drDigitalSuccess: You can identify suspicious popups and ads!
drDigitalHint: If an ad looks wrong, trust your gut and don't click it.
